'''machogo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:seaborgate|seaborgate]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-ch-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:seaborgate|seaborgate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| machogo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:mæchegeth|mæchegeth]] || [[word:mæchegej|mæchegej]] || [[word:mæchegesh|mæchegesh]] || [[word:mæchege|mæchege]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:machochogoth|machochogoth]] || [[word:machochogoj|machochogoj]] || [[word:machochogosh|machochogosh]] || [[word:machochogo|machochogo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:machogoth|machogoth]] || [[word:machogoj|machogoj]] || [[word:machogosh|machogosh]] || [[word:machogo|machogo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:machofgoth|machofgoth]] || [[word:machofgoj|machofgoj]] || [[word:machofgosh|machofgosh]] || [[word:machofgof|machofgof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:machogotho|machogotho]] || [[word:machogojo|machogojo]] || [[word:machogosho|machogosho]] || [[word:machogoko|machogoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:machogoth|machogoth]] || [[word:machogoj|machogoj]] || [[word:machogosh|machogosh]] || [[word:machogo|machogo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:machogothol|machogothol]] || [[word:machogojol|machogojol]] || [[word:machogoshol|machogoshol]] || [[word:machogokol|machogokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:machogothotho|machogothotho]] || [[word:machogojojo|machogojojo]] || [[word:machogoshosho|machogoshosho]] || [[word:machogoko|machogoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:machogothon|machogothon]] || [[word:machogojon|machogojon]] || [[word:machogoshon|machogoshon]] || [[word:machogokon|machogokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:machogothoro|machogothoro]] || [[word:machogojoro|machogojoro]] || [[word:machogoshoro|machogoshoro]] || [[word:machogokoro|machogokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|ed5025b}}
